title: cupressus × notabilis
intro: Cupressus × notabilis, also known as the Leyland cypress, is a popular evergreen tree that is a hybrid of the Monterey cypress and the Alaskan yellow cypress. It has been used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The health benefits of Cupressus × notabilis include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, essential oils, and tinctures, which can be used to promote relaxation and alleviate symptoms of various health conditions.
